assertions.description: INCORRECT: The decoupling_placement analysis reports C1 (470pF, 9.6mm from U2) as a nearby capacitor for U2 (MCP3221 ADC). However, C1's connected nets are ['GND', 'Net-(U1-Vout)'] — it is a filter capacitor on the MPXV7007DP pressure sensor analog output, not a power supply decoupling cap for U2. U2 (MCP3221) runs on +5V, but C1 shares no +5V net with U2. The actual +5V decoupling capacitors are C2 (0.1uF) and C3 (10uF), which are on the +5V/GND nets but are placed near U4 (MAX98357). U2 has no dedicated decoupling capacitor on its power supply rail. The analyzer's proximity-based matching without verifying shared power net membership produces a false positive here.
